Event: Tavern of Fortune - October 2025
Event Date: 23/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI247
Broken Oath Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals 500000 pure damage to 3 enemy units with the highest spell power, steals 20% spell power from them for 4 sec., and starts incinerating these units for 3 sec. Every enemy unit being incinerated receives 150000 pure damage per second for 3 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around each target being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original target. When the incineration effect wears off, the targets are weakened: their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Tavern of Fortune - October 2025

Event date: 23/10/2025

Sage bot code: RI247

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
